title: Neo-Glitch Skyline
description: An intricate, abstract aesthetic featuring hyper-detailed glowing circuitry, crystalline data streams, and fragmented holographic projections against a shadowy, high-tech urban landscape.

Aesthetic Context: An intricate, abstract aesthetic featuring hyper-detailed glowing circuitry, crystalline data streams, and fragmented holographic projections against a shadowy, high-tech urban landscape..
